# Superset Trainer Copilot Instructions

- This is a browser-based Vite + React + TypeScript app.
- Keep the UI mobile-first, touch-friendly, and easy to use on Android browsers.
- Treat client data, programs, exercise edits, and session logs as local-first browser state unless a backend is explicitly added later.
- Preserve the current visual style when adding new screens or controls.
- Prefer small, reusable components and clear state transitions for forms and session flows.
- Update the README when setup, scripts, or hosting guidance changes.
